title: Widget Gallery

savings-goal.name: Savings Goal
savings-goal.description: How close are you to your goal?

daily-tip.name: Daily Tip
daily-tip.description: A new financial tip every day

quotes: Where money talks, everyone else is deaf.
Budgeting: telling your money where to go.
Credit card: the love story between you and the bank.
Savings: a gift to your future self.
Interest: the bank's way of saying "thank you".
Debt: the past's gift, the future's nightmare.
Wealth: not having money, but money not having you.
Payday: the best 5 minutes of the month.

1.title: The Golden Rule
1.text: 50% of income for needs, 30% for wants, 20% for savings.

2.title: The Installment Trap
2.text: Installment purchases increase the total amount paid. Pay in full when possible.

3.title: Statement Closing
3.text: Purchases made right after the statement closing date give you the longest payment term.

4.title: The Minimum Payment Trap
4.text: By making only minimum payments, you lose 95% of your balance to interest.

5.title: Golden Window
5.text: The period between the due date and statement closing is the "golden window". Shopping during this time is most advantageous.

6.title: Debt Snowball
6.text: Pay off the smallest debt first for motivation, then move to larger ones.

7.title: Emergency Fund
7.text: Build an emergency fund covering 3-6 months of expenses. Don't rely on credit cards.

8.title: Limit Utilization
8.text: Using more than 30% of your credit card limit lowers your Findeks score.

ios.title: iOS
ios.step1: Long press on an empty area of the home screen
ios.step2: Tap the + button in the top left
ios.step6: Drag the widget to your desired location

android.title: Android
android.step1: Long press on an empty area of the home screen
android.step4: Long press the desired widget and drag it to the home screen

setupGuide.note: Widget support is coming soon. For now, you can preview these widgets within the app.
